Chronology of every recorded fact about [[House]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The House has no outside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The House contains a pool that can heal wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The House features an artificial sky and a huge fruit tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon has prizes from the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Nye are bound to the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon considers escaping into the House.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The House's entry hall is visible through the Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Some members of the House would see Valinhall's actions as being on the Incarnation's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — The Incarnation has access to almost all of the House's powers in unlimited supply.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The House is described as incomprehensibly vast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — The House is a place that Kai and others are associated with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The House contains halls that Simon ran through.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Kai can banish Mithra within the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The House is a place where Simon received training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The House is a location Simon passes through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Leah mentions the House as a place she can follow the King into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Kai used to lounge around the House all day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The power Simon is calling from is not the House.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
